title: The Piano Motif
wikitext:
[]: The Piano Motif Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Jul 14, 2012 11:21 pm Apparently, am judging from the posters and the new trailer , pianos or piano music seems to be a part of Q... What do you think? Is it mere teasing; is the playing piano unfinished material of a scene or is this the first step into an ambiguous and abstract movie akin of episode 20? My opinion: Kaworu, we see him playing in the manga, maybe that trait will be taken over into Rebuild...

[]: Re: The Piano Motif Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Jul 14, 2012 11:38 pm arael wrote: My opinion: Kaworu, we see him playing in the manga, maybe that trait will be taken over into Rebuild...

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 16, 2012 3:46 am Discussion on the piano already happening in here . A separate conversation seems redundant at the moment.
